name: study-terminal
description: Gamified study terminal with AI-generated flashcards and spaced repetition

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/app.mjs --format=esm --jsx=automatic --loader:.js=jsx --external:better-sqlite3 --external:@anthropic-ai/sdk --define:process.env.NODE_ENV=\"production\" --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.start: npm run build && NODE_ENV=production node dist/app.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run build && NODE_ENV=production node dist/app.mjs
